title: Loose Parts Collage
description: A nature-art composition game where kids arrange leaves, buttons, yarn, and pinecones onto ghost outlines.
learningGoals: Notice patterns and placement in art
Connect digital collage to real loose-part play
interactionModel: build-assemble drag or tap-tap loose parts onto ghost positions
feedbackModel: Correct parts pop, sparkle, and speak the part name; misses wiggle gently with a spoken nudge and retry. Finished pictures speak a warm nature-art line.
credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder loose-part art only. Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
